items.name: Gold Special White Infinity Visor Glasses
Golden Tengu, Japanese traditional mask
items.description:
✨ ✨ LIMITED EDITION ✨ ✨ 
🔴 Other variations:

White Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/124507370440659

Black Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/76162011454800/

Red Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/83744288875009

The red Tengu mask with its long, bulbous nose and stern expression is one of the most distinctive of all traditional Japanese masks. 
This wooden, reddish-brown mask is deeply connected to Japanese folklore, representing the mythical Tengu, a bird-like creature. 
These beings, known as 「天狗  •（てんぐ  •  Tengu）」, are often associated with their mystical abilities and are seen as protectors of the mountains and forests. 

Made by wyssion
All rights reserved.

More from Aluvion UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Aluvion+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale
